query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_delivery_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_users
FROM users 
WHERE role = 'delivery'
